query_title: Alvin and the Chipmunks Meet Frankenstein

recommendations.title: Young Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: A young neurosurgeon inherits the castle of his grandfather, the famous Dr. Victor von Frankenstein. In the castle he finds a funny hunchback, a pretty lab assistant and the elderly housekeeper. Young Frankenstein believes that the work of his grandf

recommendations.title: Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Frankenstein, a young medical student, trying to create the perfect human being, instead creates a misshapen monster. Made ill by what he has done, Frankenstein is comforted by his fiancée; but on his wedding night he is visited by the monster.

recommendations.title: The Nut Job 2: Nutty by Nature
recommendations.overview: When the evil mayor of Oakton decides to bulldoze Liberty Park and build a dangerous amusement park in its place, Surly Squirrel and his ragtag group of animal friends need to band together to save their home, defeat the mayor, and take back the park

recommendations.title: Dark Ride
recommendations.overview: Ten years after he brutally murdered two girls, a killer escapes from a mental institution and returns to his turf, the theme park attraction called Dark Ride. About to crash his path are a group of college kids on a road trip who stumble across the

recommendations.title: Doug's 1st Movie
recommendations.overview: Doug and his pal Skeeter set's out to find the monster of Lucky Duck Lake. Though things get really out of hand when some one blurts out that the monster is real.

recommendations.title: Hair-Raising Hare
recommendations.overview: A sneaker-wearing, hairy monster chases Bugs through a castle belonging to an evil scientist.

recommendations.title: Bride of Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Dr. Frankenstein and his monster both turn out to be alive after being attacked by an angry mob. The now-chastened scientist attempts to escape his past, but a former mentor forces him to assist with the creation of a new creature.

recommendations.title: Bud Abbott and Lou Costello Meet Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: The Wolf Man tries to warn a dimwitted porter that Dracula wants his brain for Frankenstein monster's body.

recommendations.title: Transylvania 6-5000
recommendations.overview: Two reporters travel to a strange castle in Transylvania to investigate the apparent reappearance of Frankenstein, and encounter the sensitive Wolfman, the Vampiress Odette and a whole cast of other weirdos.

recommendations.title: Foodfight!
recommendations.overview: The evil Brand X joins a supermarket that becomes a city after closing time.
